description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, giving it a clean and minimalist appearance. The house features two stories, with the upper floor partially open to the outside, possibly as a terrace or balcony. Surrounding the house are several mature trees and a small conifer, providing shade and a sense of privacy. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some spanning nearly the full height of the walls, especially on the front and side facades. The main entryway is accessible via a short set of steps and is subtly integrated into the overall design, lacking ornate features but emphasizing functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a minimalist light exterior, surrounded by mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a terrace or balcony on the upper floor, with several trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, multiple large windows, and the arrangement of trees along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upper floor's open terrace area and more windows, with fewer trees visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's clean lines, window placement, and the cluster of trees adjacent to the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a short set of steps, flush door, and no decorative overhang or columns
